changeSet.author: pvorobiev
changeSet.sql: alter table portal.arrangements drop constraint if exists ck_status; alter table portal.arrangements add constraint ck_status check ( status in ('NEW', 'FORMED', 'SCHEDULED', 'RUNNING', 'ACTION_REQUIRED', 'FINISHED', 'ERROR', 'ACT_SENT'));

rollback.sql: alter table portal.arrangements drop constraint if exists ck_status; alter table portal.arrangements add constraint ck_status check ( status in ('NEW', 'FORMED', 'SCHEDULED', 'RUNNING', 'ACTION_REQUIRED', 'FINISHED', 'ERROR'));
